title: Treasury yields tick higher as U.S.-Iran standoff persists and investors await April PMI
summary_full: The yield on the 10-year U.S. Treasury note — the key benchmark for U.S. government borrowing — was up more than 2 basis points at 4.214%.
summary_public: The yield on the 10-year U.S. Treasury note — the key benchmark for U.S. government borrowing — was up more than 2 basis points at 4.214%.
